CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Aug-12-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No. 1
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO NUVOLUM INC.'S RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET NO. ONE; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel further responses to the special interrogatories, set one, is granted. Defendant's objections lack merit. Defendant shall provide amended responses within two weeks of notice of entry of this order.

Plaintiff seeks sanctions. Defendant's objections lack substantial justification. Defendant and its counsel are sanctioned $3000, payable jointly and severally within 30 days of notice of entry of this order.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Nuvolum Inc.S Response To Plaintiffs Demand For Production, Set No. Two; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO NUVOLUM INC.'S RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION, SET NO. TWO; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel further responses to the request for production of documents, set two, is granted. Defendant's objections lack merit. Defendant shall provide amended responses within two weeks of notice of entry of this order and shall produce responsive documents. Defendant may withhold privileged documents but must provide a privilege log.

Plaintiff seeks sanctions. Defendant's objections lack substantial justification. Defendant and its counsel are sanctioned $3000, payable jointly and severally within 30 days of notice of entry of this order.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
